name: rtk-hook
description: Codex plugin that registers RTK's native PreToolUse hook.

interface.shortDescription: Registers RTK's native Codex command rewrite hook.
interface.longDescription: Registers the native `rtk hook codex` PreToolUse command from RTK. The hook lets RTK rewrite Bash tool input through Codex updatedInput, while Codex keeps handling command approval.
defaultPrompt: Use RTK's native Codex hook for shell commands.
